isConsumingScheduledOp().details: Returns true only in the context of a delayed restricted call, at the moment that the scheduled operation is being consumed. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls.

openDispute(uint8,uint256,address,addres.details: Only callable by authorized modules (e.g. Marketplace)

params.evidenceURI: IPFS or other reference to dispute evidence
params.relatedId: ID of the disputed resource (orderId, reservationId)

setAuthority(address).details: Transfers control to a new authority. The caller must be the current authority.

finalizeDispute(uint256,uint8).notice: Finalize a dispute with an outcome

hasActiveDispute(uint8,uint256).notice: Check if a resource has an active dispute

openDispute(uint8,uint256,address,addres.notice: Open a new dispute scoped to this contract's immutable community

setDisputeReceiver(address).notice: Set the dispute receiver contract (e.g. Marketplace)
